description_long: This sculpture depicts a nude female figure standing upright on a rectangular base. The figure's posture is relaxed, with both arms hanging naturally at her sides and her head slightly tilted downward, giving a contemplative or introspective expression. Her hair is styled in a loose, voluminous manner, with a prominent section gathered at the back. The anatomical details are rendered with a realistic approach, showing subtle musculature and natural body proportions. The surface of the sculpture appears to have a matte, slightly rough finish, suggesting it is made from cast bronze or a similar material. The base is simple and unadorned, providing stable support for the figure.
description: A realistic nude female figure stands on a rectangular base, with natural posture and detailed anatomical features. The sculpture has a matte, slightly rough surface and a contemplative expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal anatomy, relaxed arms, and downward-tilted head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the gathered hair at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back anatomy, hair volume, and the simple rectangular base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm, and the curvature of the body.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
